title: MD
biography: Crawford Long was an American physician who first used diethyl ether as a surgical anesthetic in 1842, predating the famous public demonstration at Massachusetts General Hospital by four years.
aiSummary: Crawford Long is a anesthesiology specialist at Private practice, Jefferson, Georgia. Based in United States.

timeline.title: First use of ether anesthesia in surgery
timeline.description: Administered ether to James Venable before removing a neck tumor, the first use of anesthesia in surgery
